summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification for 10 job candidates using the hydrated preflight artifact as live state. No GitHub mutations are proposed beyond non-mutating classification, and security-sensitive refs are quarantined item-by-item.

actions.reason: Security-boundary-shaped gateway no-auth behavior must be handled outside Clownfish backlog cleanup.
